overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a futuristic convertible through Night City at dusk. The vehicle navigates from open urban streets with holographic billboards into a covered multi-level highway system illuminated by colorful neon LED barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: car shifts slightly right while maintaining speed through the commercial district

agents.ego_description: driving a futuristic gold convertible through city streets, following a silver sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining steady speed
pedestrian walking along the sidewalk near digital billboards

entered.detail: large circular structure with rotating holographic advertisements suspended above the street intersection
large teal-colored digital billboard with Japanese text and graphics mounted on building facade
tall skyscraper with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk along the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic city street at dusk, with the camera following a convertible as it drives toward a large circular holographic billboard structure. Neon signs including a prominent teal Kenji billboard illuminate the right side, while glass skyscrapers and palm trees line the left. The vehicle maintains a steady pace following traffic through the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and highway entrance

events.description: car executes a right turn at the intersection, navigating around the crosswalk
vehicle enters the covered highway underpass, transitioning from open sky to enclosed roadway

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn at the intersection and accelerating into the highway entrance ramp

notable_agents.action: white car driving in the adjacent lane parallel to the ego vehicle
pedestrian crossing the street at the marked crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
curved concrete ramp leading into the elevated highway system

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a right turn at a city intersection, crossing over pedestrian zebra stripes before accelerating into a highway entrance ramp. The circular holographic billboard moves to the left as the car turns, and the environment begins transitioning from open commercial streets to the enclosed highway system.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered multi-level highway with illuminated LED barriers

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from natural dusk to artificial neon as the car enters the covered highway section
car navigates a gentle left curve while maintaining highway speed

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the covered highway, weaving between traffic under colorful neon lights

notable_agents.action: blue sports car overtaking on the left side in the adjacent lane
white sedan driving ahead in the distance maintaining speed

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass structure overhead blocking the sky
highway safety barrier illuminated with bright pink LED lights
highway barrier illuminated with green LED lights further down the road
curved elevated ramp structure with yellow illumination rising on the right side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered highway section where natural light gives way to vibrant artificial neon illumination. Pink and green LED barriers line the left side of the road, while complex elevated ramps and overpasses create a layered concrete environment overhead. The car accelerates through the curved roadway, passing other vehicles in the multi-lane corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway corridor with corporate neon signage

events.description: passing under complex series of overpasses with large corporate signage becoming visible on the right
car continues along the curved highway ramp, navigating moderate traffic flow

agents.ego_description: cruising through the multi-level highway system, navigating gentle curves with moderate traffic surrounding the vehicle

notable_agents.action: white and blue classic-style car driving parallel in the left lane
dark colored car merging from the right ramp into the flow of traffic

entered.detail: large red neon sign with 'PETROCHEM' text mounted on the building facade, glowing brightly
thick concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the covered highway system, where the prominent red Petrochem neon sign dominates the right side of the view. The vehicle navigates through moderate traffic surrounded by concrete support pillars and complex elevated ramps. Colorful LED barriers continue to line the road as the car maintains speed through the curved corridor of the multi-level highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city at dusk that transitions from open commercial streets into a neon-lit, covered highway system. It begins by following a convertible driving past glass skyscrapers and palm trees toward a large circular holographic billboard and a teal Kenji sign. As the vehicle executes a right turn across pedestrian zebra stripes, the open urban environment shifts into a highway entrance ramp, moving the holographic structures to the periphery. The scene then expands into a covered multi-level corridor where natural dusk light is replaced by vibrant pink and green LED barriers and complex concrete overpasses. Finally, the camera accelerates through the curved roadway, passing other vehicles and concrete support pillars before gliding past a prominent red Petrochem neon sign.
